content:
# Session 64 (iter-064) ‚Äî review

## Metadata
- Lane: SOLO fine-grained on `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjInverse.lean` (Cone A bridge-3 chain).
- Sorry: **6 ‚Üí 5**. Build GREEN-mod-sorry, `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjInverse` exit 0 (8324 jobs), axiom-clean.
- This was the first SUBSTANTIVE prover run since iter-058 (059‚Äì062 = 401-auth-death; iter-063 reduced but closed 0). The never-executed iter-058 corrective finally landed real closures.

## Targets & outcomes

### SOLVED ‚Äî `tensorObj_left_unitor_image_collapse` (NEW keystone, L1316)
The genuine shared STU-collapse hard core that blocked iters 057‚Äì063. Blueprint `lem:tensorobj_left_unitor_image_collapse`.
Statement: `Œº_{ùüô,P} ‚â´ (Œµ ‚ñ∑ aP) ‚â´ Œª_{aP} = a.map Œª_P` (`Œº=sheafifyTensorUnitIso`, `Œµ=sheafifyUnitIso`), arbitrary presheaf-of-modules `P`.
- Route: reduce to pure presheaf identity `hpre : (Œ∑_ùüô ‚äó Œ∑_P);(Œµ ‚äó ùüô);Œª_{aP} = Œª_P ; Œ∑_P`, merge the three `a.map` legs, cancel trailing counit by adjunction **left-triangle**. **NO localization-monoidal API used** (by-hand reduction).
- Seam-robust idioms (forced by `restrictScalars ùüô`/`ùü≠.obj` defeq-not-syntactic seams):
  - `htri` (`Œ∑.app ùüô_ ‚â´ sheafifyUnitIso.hom.val = ùüô`): `rw [sheafifyUnitIso]; simpa only [Iso.app_hom, asIso_hom] using (sheafificationAdjunction _).right_triangle_components _`.
  - presheaf collapse: `rw [tensorHom_comp_tensorHom, ‚Üê leftUnitor_naturality]; congr 1; exact congrArg‚ÇÇ (fun a b => tensorHom (C:=ùí´) a b) htri (Category.comp_id _)`. (`rw[htri]`/`simp[htri]` BOTH MISS ‚Äî `ùüô_` vs `unit.val` defeq; `congrArg‚ÇÇ` term-mode absorbs.)
  - merge legs: `erw [‚Üê Functor.map_comp_assoc, ‚Üê Functor.map_comp_assoc]` (goal LEFT-assoc; `rw[‚Üê Category.assoc]`/`rw[‚Üê Functor.map_comp]` MISS).
  - apply `hpre` into `a.map`: `refine Eq.trans (congrArg (fun m => a.map m ‚â´ counit) hpre) ?_; beta_reduce`.
  - left-triangle (counit codomain `ùü≠.obj` wrapper ‚Üí `rw` MISSES / `erw` whnf-BOMBS): `erw [Functor.map_comp_assoc]; have htr := (...).left_triangle_components P; exact (congrArg (fun z => a.map (Œª_ P).hom ‚â´ z) htr).trans (Category.comp_id _)` (left factor EXPLICIT ‚Äî a `_` hole becomes z-dependent and fails).
- Auditor: HONEST, no circularity, no sorry.

### SOLVED ‚Äî `tensorObj_left_unitor_pullback_eq_sheafify` (L2, L1391) ‚Üí sorry 6‚Üí5
After the existing `hw`/`hnat`/`hcomb` reductions, residual = `image_collapse` at `P = F M.val` post-composed with trailing `pbv_M`:
`simpa only [Category.assoc] using congrArg (¬∑ ‚â´ (pullbackValIso f M).hom) (tensorObj_left_unitor_image_collapse (Y := Y) ((PresheafOfModules.pullback _).obj M.val))`.
Not circular (L2 reduces to L1; L1 proved first). Checker + auditor both confirm faithful + closed.

### PARTIAL ‚Äî `pullbackUnitIso_whisker_eq_sheafify_eta_whisker` (L3, L1467, sorry L1509)
3a step-1 in place (`rw [tensorObjIsoOfIso_hom, pullbackUnitIso_eq_sheafify_eta f, Iso.refl_hom]`). Blocker (diagnosed, tractable): needs a SECOND coherence core = `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` naturality in **arg-1** along oplax unit `Œ∑`, reducing (same toolkit as image_collapse) to **sheafification-UNIT naturality** + `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom`; then mechanical 3a/3b bifunctorial split + flank-leg cancellation. Recommend naming `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_naturality_left`, proving it first. NOT attempted to completion (~8‚Äì12 seam-fighting cycles).

### PARTIAL ‚Äî `pullbackTensorMap_left_unitality` (bridge-3, L1519, sorry L1583)
Assembly only; **now gated SOLELY on L3** (L2 closed this iter). `rw [pullbackTensorMap_eq_sheafify_delta, pullback_map_tensorObj_left_unitor_eq]; erw [‚Üê hHLU]` in place; residual = reassoc-across-`SheafOfModules`-seam + L3‚ÜíL2 chain. Closes S4b (sorry 5‚Üí3) once L3 lands.

### BLOCKED / deferred (not this lane)
- S3 `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` (L1099), S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (L1123) = Cone B (independent internal-hom construction; sibling file `PresheafDualPullback.lean` never created).
- telescope `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L1832) ‚Äî master cocycle, depends on the squares.
All auditor-confirmed as genuine open obligations (not stubs).

## Subagent reports
- **lean-auditor** (`iter064`): clean ‚Äî 0 critical/major, 1 minor (stale iter-044/051 STATUS comment L830‚Äì841, prior-flagged, cosmetic). Both new proofs HONEST. All 5 sorries genuine. `task_results/lean-auditor-iter064.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** (`tensorobjinverse-iter064`): Lean statements faithful, two proven lemmas correct. **1 MAJOR (blueprint-side):** `image_collapse` proof prose + `\uses` document a localization-monoidal route the formalization AVOIDED (by-hand adjunction-triangle); `\uses` cites 3 unused lemmas, omits the actual ones. 2 minor (Œº hom/inv display reconciliation; "definitional/no seam-chasing" over-optimism). No must-fix-this-iter. `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tensorobjinverse-iter064.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:tensorobj_left_unitor_image_collapse`: added **proof-block `\leanok`** (manual override). Justification: proof is sorry-free and the module builds (exit 0, 8324 jobs); both auditor + checker independently confirm the proof is closed and honest; the file's convention marks completed proof blocks with `\leanok` (164 such blocks). `sync_leanok` (iter 64, added:1) marked only the new STATEMENT block, leaving the completed proof block unmarked.
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:tensorobj_left_unitor_pullback_eq_sheafify` (L2): added **proof-block `\leanok`** (manual override). Same justification ‚Äî proof closed/sorry-free (auditor + checker confirm "the proof is closed"); sync left the proof block unmarked.
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:tensorobj_left_unitor_image_collapse`: added `% NOTE (review iter-064)` in the proof block flagging the proof-route divergence (localization-monoidal prose vs formalized adjunction-triangle route) and the wrong `\uses`, directing the plan agent to dispatch a blueprint-writer.

## Blueprint doctor
- Flags chapter `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` `% archon:covers AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjSubstrate/DualInverse/PresheafDualPullback.lean` ‚Äî file does not exist (Cone B sibling never created; persistent since iter-058). Surfaced in recommendations.

## Notes (LOW)
- 6 `set_option maxHeartbeats` bumps in-file, all documented (auditor: not a smell at this complexity).
- `CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val` deprecation warning (L1872) ‚Äî cosmetic.

## Key finding
The STU-collapse keystone ‚Äî the single structural residual that blocked L2 and L3 across iters 057‚Äì063 ‚Äî is PROVEN. The seam-robust term-mode toolkit (congrArg‚ÇÇ / htri right-triangle / map_comp_assoc merge / explicit-left-factor left-triangle) is now established and directly portable to the L3 sibling core (`sheafifyTensorUnitIso_naturality_left`).
